allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const files={'PunService.php':'e:/php/think1/app/service/PunService.php','Overlay':'e:/php/think1/pun-game/src/components/PunPassSuccessOverlay.vue','playXhs':'e:/php/think1/pun-game/src/pages-sub/playXhs/playXhs.vue','playMid':'e:/php/think1/pun-game/src/pages-sub/playMid/playMid.vue','play':'e:/php/think1/pun-game/src/pages-sub/play/play.vue','battlePlay':'e:/php/think1/pun-game/src/pages-sub/battlePlay/battlePlay.vue'};let allClean=true;Object.entries\(files\).forEach\(\([n,p]\)=>{const c=fs.readFileSync\(p,'utf8'\);const bad=[];if\(c.includes\('answerText'\)\)bad.push\('answerText'\);if\(c.includes\('correctAnswer'\)\)bad.push\('correctAnswer'\);if\(c.includes\('pun-pass__answer'\)\)bad.push\('pun-pass__answer'\);console.log\(n+': '+\(bad.length?'STILL HAS '+bad.join\(','\):'CLEAN'\)\);if\(bad.length\)allClean=false;}\);console.log\(allClean?'\\nAll clean!':'\\\\nSome files still need cleanup.'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const path=require\('path'\);const src='e:/php/think1/pun-game/src';function check\(f,imp\){const d=path.dirname\(f\);const r=path.resolve\(d,imp\);const exts=['.js','.ts','.vue',''];for\(const e of exts\){if\(fs.existsSync\(r+e\)\)return true;if\(fs.existsSync\(path.join\(r,'index'+e\)\)\)return true;}return false;}const checks=[['pages/index/index.vue','../../utils/rewardedVideoRunner'],['pages/index/index.vue','../../constants/rewardedVideoAd'],['pages-sub/composables/usePunRewardedVideoHint.js','../../utils/rewardedVideoRunner'],['pages-sub/tasks/tasks.vue','../../utils/rewardedVideoRunner'],['utils/rewardedVideoRunner.js','../constants/rewardedVideoAd']];checks.forEach\(\([f,i]\)=>console.log\(\(check\(src+'/'+f,i\)?'OK':'BROKEN'\)+' '+f+' -> '+i\)\);")
